issues.sample: I BOUGHT A 2021 4RUNNER LATE APRIL OF 2021. I REPORTED AND SCHEDULED AN APPOINTMENT FOR A BALANCE CHECK. THIS DIDN'T SEEM TO FIX THE PROBLEM. WHILE THEY WHERE IN THE PROCESS OF BALANCING THE TECH BROKE 2 CENTER CAPS. I WILL SETTING UP AN APPOINTMENT TO HAVE THE DEALERSHIP RECHECK

narrative.headline: What 2021 Toyota 4runner owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 33 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Steering (36% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
